body: Open the PR for the record. We can talk about where to put the test case in the end.
title: Add rossby haurwitz wave test case

body:
This PR adds unit tests and convergence tests for the strong and weak forms of gradient and divergence operators, and the strong form curl operator on the sphere. 

(@simonbyrne Weak form curl operator is commented out in the test file because dss fails to perform on the Convariant3Vector in [this line](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/blob/jh/sph-operator-tests/test/sphere_curl.jl#L36). We could either wait till the dss is fixed or merge this first and add the weak curl test once the dss is ready.)
title: Add unit tests for operators on the sphere
